name: payroll-journal-entry
title: Payroll Journal Entry
description: Upload payroll reports, extract data with AI, review and post journal entries.
starter_prompt:
Build me a payroll journal entry app. I want to upload payroll reports from my payroll provider (PDF or CSV), have AI read the report and generate the debit/credit journal entry lines, review them for accuracy, and then post.

Here is what I need:

1. **Upload and extract**: A way to upload a payroll report. When uploaded, an AI automation should read the document — whether it's a PDF or CSV — and generate journal entry lines with account codes, account names, departments, debit amounts, credit amounts, and memos.

2. **Review workflow**: Payroll runs should flow through statuses: draft → processing → review → posted or rejected. After extraction, the run lands in "review" with all journal lines displayed. Flag it if debits don't equal credits.

3. **Dashboard**: A dashboard showing total payroll runs, how many are pending review, how many posted, and how many in draft. Plus a table of recent runs showing pay period, pay date, total debits, and status.

4. **Payroll runs list**: A list page with status filter tabs, pagination, and links to each run's detail page.

5. **Run detail**: A detail page showing the uploaded document alongside a journal entries table with columns for account code, account name, department, debit, credit, and memo. Show totals at the bottom and highlight if out of balance. Post and reject buttons when in review status.

6. **GL accounts**: A collection of payroll GL accounts (code, name, account type) manageable from a settings page.

7. **Seed data**: A seed script with sample GL accounts and a couple of demo payroll runs with journal entries.

Read AGENTS.md and the files in .claude/skills/ first to understand the Lumera SDK patterns, then build it out.
